data.body: CODE-REVIEW GERRIT DATA LIMITATION: bot posts findings in review MESSAGES not inline comments (0 inline). 282 bot msgs: 266 pass+1 (only report advisory COUNT, not criterion/priority), 5 block-finding (~all DET secret-detection), 5 coverage-gap vetoes, 1 old-format detailed. => code-review has NO per-criterion priority history to replay; only block-rate + nit-volume. To assess code-review LLM thresholds need live re-run of gate on sampled diffs OR accept statistical/historical argument. Plan-review CAN be replayed (rich sidecars w/ priority+validity+norm_id).
